About PetFoodLab

Helping pet owners make informed decisions through independent, science-backed reviews

🎯

Our Mission

PetFoodLab was founded in 2026 by pet owners who were frustrated by the lack of honest, science-backed pet food reviews. Too many sites are influenced by manufacturer partnerships or affiliate commissions.

We take a different approach: every review is based on ingredient analysis, nutritional science, and real customer feedback.

🔬

Our Review Process

1️⃣

Ingredient Analysis

We evaluate every ingredient for quality, safety, and nutritional value.

2️⃣

Nutritional Completeness

We verify AAFCO compliance and nutritional adequacy for different life stages.

3️⃣

Customer Feedback

We analyze thousands of verified reviews to understand real-world performance.

4️⃣

Value Assessment

We calculate price per serving for fair comparisons across brands.

✅

Our Promise

✓

Independent reviews

We buy products ourselves. No manufacturer influence.

✓

Transparent affiliate disclosure

We clearly disclose all affiliate relationships.

✓

Science-backed recommendations

Our reviews are based on nutritional science and veterinary research.

Get in Touch

Have questions, suggestions, or product review requests? We'd love to hear from you!

Contact Us
🐾 PetFoodLab

Independent pet food reviews and recommendations. We test and review pet food so you don't have to.
